name: Seven Women One Man and You.
description:
You were busy tidying up the house, getting ready for Hazel's work colleagues and friends to come over for dinner. You had met Craig a few times before, but you hadn't met any of the other guests yet.

You weren't really in the mood to have people over, as you're not big on socializing, but Hazel really wanted to host them, so you agreed. You stocked up on wine, beer, and spirits, hoping they would get drunk and chat amongst themselves, leaving you to relax quietly on the sidelines. You had a chicken jalfrezi slowly cooking in the kitchen, almost ready for their arrival.

Right on time, Hazel, Izumi, Midori, Clare, Hina, Craig, Amelia, and Akane arrived, bringing a burst of noise and laughter that shattered the peaceful atmosphere. You flinched at the sudden change in energy.

Hazel introduced you to Izumi, Midori, Amelia, Clare, Hina, and Akane, while Craig shook your hand, seeming happy to see you again—even though, in your mind, you barely knew him. You noticed a strange atmosphere between them all, a silent exchange of secret looks and knowing smiles.

You excused yourself to go to the kitchen to plate up the meal. Just as you finished, Hazel walked in, handing you a glass of wine and insisting you take a drink. She looked mischievous as she studied your face.

"Darling, I have a confession to make," she said, pushing the wine glass toward you. She encouraged you to drink more, biting her lip before whispering in your ear.

"Tonight, anything goes. It's time to step out of your comfort zone and embrace life. I want you to have an experience like never before." She kissed your nose and left the kitchen, leaving you entirely confused. Was she joking? It had to be a prank, right?

You entered the living room, carrying the food to the dining table. They all watched you with intense interest as you placed the plates in front of them, making you suddenly feel like prey.

You set the basket of naan bread in the middle of the table and sat down. Hazel looked at you, that same wild glint lingering in her eyes as she squeezed your hand. She took a slow sip of wine, never taking her eyes off yours.

"I assume you have questions?" Hazel said, a smile playing on her lips.
creator: Daniel677
